title: Registered 4:3 Dam intro capture: native draws far shore/bridge geometry (x~430/540) stock omits — DAM-R2 force-admit may OVER-admit vs retail's authored PVS
suspect: src/game/bg.c (playerHasFrozenIntroCamera frustum force-admit, DAM-R2/R-01 fix, LEVELID_DAM-gated)
src/game/bg.c:3456 (sub_GAME_7F0B38B4, authored opcode-100 PVS consumer, no live caller — R-02)
repro: SDL_AUDIODRIVER=dummy GE007_MUTE=1 GE007_ENABLE_LEVEL_INTRO=1 GE007_INTRO_CAMERA_INDEX=4 GE007_WINDOW_WIDTH=1440 GE007_WINDOW_HEIGHT=1080 build/ge007 --rom baserom.u.z64 --level dam --no-ui --deterministic --savedir <fresh> --screenshot-label X --screenshot-frame 60 --screenshot-exit ; register against stock-ares a_estab_pad273_stock_f1400.ppm at the identity transform (sy=sx=1.000) and diff landmarks at x=140/240/320/430/540 — the x=430/540 columns show native drawing far shore/bridge geometry stock omits. tools/rom_oracle_routes/dam_r2_establishing_visual.json is the registered route for this camera (INTRO_CAMERA_INDEX=4); GE007_NO_INTRO_FARVISTA_ADMIT=1 isolates the force-admit as the source.

evidence.path: docs/audit/DAM_RENDER_DEEP_DIVE_2026-07-18.md:538-543 (R-01, Task 5b re-registered geometry) — landmark mean |dy| across 10 detections improved 57.7px -> 22.5px after registering stock->native at the identity transform (sy=sx=1.000, corr 0.683); the residual deltas concentrate on the right half (x=430/540), where native draws far shore/bridge geometry that stock does NOT draw. This is the opposite direction from DAM-R2/R-01's original premise (retail draws far rooms native was missing); it was invisible pre-registration because the unregistered 16:9-vs-4:3 comparison (FID-0135, 0.75x vertical squeeze) swamped the smaller over-admission signal. Candidate mechanism: the Dam-scoped frustum force-admit landed for R-01 (playerHasFrozenIntroCamera, bg.c) admits every frustum-visible loaded room draw-only, which is coarser than retail's authored per-room PVS and can admit rooms retail's authors chose to omit (e.g. for a deliberately bare view across the open-water gap).

history.note: Filed per review-fix round 2 (2026-07-20) on fix/tier1-residuals, following Task 5b's capture-aspect correction (FID-0135/FID-0136). Cross-referenced from R-01 and R-02 in DAM_RENDER_DEEP_DIVE_2026-07-18.md. Not root-caused: the frustum force-admit (R-01) is the prime suspect since it is the only admission-affecting change on this path, but this has not been isolated with GE007_NO_INTRO_FARVISTA_ADMIT=1 A/B on the registered 4:3 capture — that isolation is the next step before any fix. Do not conflate with R-02's under-admission premise (FID-0121) — this is the complementary over-admission direction, both live on the same admission path pending R-02 (authored PVS) landing.
